Title: Arbitrary code execution in protobufjs
Description: protobufjs compiles protobuf definitions into JS functions. Attackers can manipulate these definitions to execute arbitrary JS code.
AffectedVersions: All versions before 7.5.5, all versions starting from 8.0.0 before 8.0.1
NotImpacted: All versions starting from 7.5.5 before 8.0.0, all versions starting from 8.0.1
